cob_people_detection package from cob_people_perception repo

cob_leg_detection cob_openni2_tracker cob_people_detection cob_people_perception cob_people_tracking_filter libnite2

indigo

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup
  • Merge pull request #1 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixes for opencv 2 in indigo
  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3
  • Merge pull request #73 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev
  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

File truncated at 100 lines see the full file

Wiki Tutorials

This package does not provide any links to tutorials in it's rosindex metadata. You can check on the ROS Wiki Tutorials page for the package.

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
catkin
message_runtime
image_view
actionlib
actionlib_msgs
cob_image_flip
cob_perception_msgs
cob_vision_utils
cv_bridge
dynamic_reconfigure
geometry_msgs
image_transport
image_geometry
message_generation
nodelet
pcl_ros
roscpp
sensor_msgs
std_msgs
std_srvs
stereo_msgs
tf

System Dependencies

Name
boost
libopencv-dev
libpcl-all-dev

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
cob_people_perception

Launch files

  • ros/launch/coordinator.launch
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
  • ros/launch/detection_tracker.launch
  • ros/launch/face_capture.launch
  • ros/launch/face_detector.launch
  • ros/launch/face_recognizer.launch
  • ros/launch/fn_test.launch
  • ros/launch/head_detector.launch
  • ros/launch/image_flip.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
  • ros/launch/image_flip_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: $(arg camera)_nodelet_manager]
  • ros/launch/kinect_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]
  • ros/launch/people_detection.launch
      • camera_namespace [default: camera]
      • colorimage_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/rgb/image_raw]
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/depth_registered/points]
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/$(arg camera_namespace)_nodelet_manager]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • launch_head_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_recognizer [default: true]
      • launch_detection_tracker [default: true]
      • launch_face_capture [default: true]
      • launch_coordinator [default: true]
      • display_results_with_image_view [default: true]
  • ros/launch/people_detection_display.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/all_people_detection.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.narrow.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.pointcloud.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.wide.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector_action.wide.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/nodelet_manager.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/openni.launch
      • cam3d [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg cam3d)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg cam3d)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]
  • ros/launch/sandbox/people_detection_nodelets.launch
      • start_manager [default: false]
  • ros/launch/sandbox/people_detection_with_viewer.launch
  • ros/launch/scene_publisher.launch
  • ros/launch/sensor_message_gateway.launch
      • colorimage_in_topic
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic
  • ros/launch/sensor_message_gateway_nodelet.launch
      • nodelet_namespace
      • nodelet_manager
      • colorimage_in_topic
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic
  • ros/launch/tracking_evaluator.launch
  • ros/test/face_detector_false_rtest.xml
  • ros/test/face_detector_true_rtest.xml

Messages

  • msg/PositionMeasurement.msg

Services

  • srv/captureImage.srv
  • srv/finishRecording.srv
  • srv/obsolete/DetectPeople.srv
  • srv/obsolete/Recognition.srv
  • srv/recognitionTrigger.srv

Plugins

  • nodelet

cob_people_detection package from cob_people_perception repo

ROS Distro
indigo

API Docs
Browse Code
  • Overview

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup
  • Merge pull request #1 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixes for opencv 2 in indigo
  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3
  • Merge pull request #73 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev
  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

File truncated at 100 lines see the full file

  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

File truncated at 100 lines see the full file

Name
boost
libopencv-dev
libpcl-all-dev

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
cob_people_perception

Launch files

  • ros/launch/coordinator.launch
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
  • ros/launch/detection_tracker.launch
  • ros/launch/face_capture.launch
  • ros/launch/face_detector.launch
  • ros/launch/face_recognizer.launch
  • ros/launch/fn_test.launch
  • ros/launch/head_detector.launch
  • ros/launch/image_flip.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
  • ros/launch/image_flip_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: $(arg camera)_nodelet_manager]
  • ros/launch/kinect_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]
  • ros/launch/people_detection.launch
      • camera_namespace [default: camera]
      • colorimage_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/rgb/image_raw]
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/depth_registered/points]
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/$(arg camera_namespace)_nodelet_manager]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • launch_head_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_recognizer [default: true]
      • launch_detection_tracker [default: true]
      • launch_face_capture [default: true]
      • launch_coordinator [default: true]
      • display_results_with_image_view [default: true]

  • ros/launch/sandbox/all_people_detection.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.narrow.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.pointcloud.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.wide.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector_action.wide.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/nodelet_manager.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/openni.launch

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup

  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3
  • Merge pull request #73 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev
  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp

  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers

  • fix header of output messages

      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic

      • nodelet_manager

      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic

  • srv/finishRecording.srv

cob_people_detection package from cob_people_perception repo

indigo

API Docs
Browse Code
  • Overview
  • 34 Assets

  • 0 Q & A

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup
  • Merge pull request #1 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixes for opencv 2 in indigo
  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3
  • Merge pull request #73 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev
  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

File truncated at 100 lines see the full file

Wiki Tutorials

This package does not provide any links to tutorials in it's rosindex metadata. You can check on the ROS Wiki Tutorials page for the package.

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
catkin
message_runtime
image_view
actionlib
actionlib_msgs
cob_image_flip
cob_perception_msgs
cob_vision_utils
cv_bridge
dynamic_reconfigure
geometry_msgs
image_transport
image_geometry
message_generation
nodelet
pcl_ros
roscpp
sensor_msgs
std_msgs
std_srvs
stereo_msgs
tf

System Dependencies

Name
boost
libopencv-dev
libpcl-all-dev

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
cob_people_perception

Launch files

  • ros/launch/coordinator.launch
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
  • ros/launch/detection_tracker.launch
  • ros/launch/face_capture.launch
  • ros/launch/face_detector.launch
  • ros/launch/face_recognizer.launch
  • ros/launch/fn_test.launch
  • ros/launch/head_detector.launch
  • ros/launch/image_flip.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
  • ros/launch/image_flip_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: $(arg camera)_nodelet_manager]
  • ros/launch/kinect_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]
  • ros/launch/people_detection.launch
      • camera_namespace [default: camera]
      • colorimage_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/rgb/image_raw]
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/depth_registered/points]
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/$(arg camera_namespace)_nodelet_manager]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • launch_head_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_recognizer [default: true]
      • launch_detection_tracker [default: true]
      • launch_face_capture [default: true]
      • launch_coordinator [default: true]
      • display_results_with_image_view [default: true]
  • ros/launch/people_detection_display.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/all_people_detection.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.narrow.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.pointcloud.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector.wide.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/face_detector_action.wide.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/nodelet_manager.launch
  • ros/launch/sandbox/openni.launch
      • cam3d [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg cam3d)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg cam3d)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]
  • ros/launch/sandbox/people_detection_nodelets.launch
      • start_manager [default: false]
  • ros/launch/sandbox/people_detection_with_viewer.launch
  • ros/launch/scene_publisher.launch
  • ros/launch/sensor_message_gateway.launch
      • colorimage_in_topic
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic
  • ros/launch/sensor_message_gateway_nodelet.launch
      • nodelet_namespace
      • nodelet_manager
      • colorimage_in_topic
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic
  • ros/launch/tracking_evaluator.launch
  • ros/test/face_detector_false_rtest.xml
  • ros/test/face_detector_true_rtest.xml

Messages

  • msg/PositionMeasurement.msg

  • srv/finishRecording.srv

cob_people_detection package from cob_people_perception repo

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup
  • Merge pull request #1 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixes for opencv 2 in indigo
  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3
  • Merge pull request #73 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev
  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

File truncated at 100 lines see the full file

  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

  • ros/launch/coordinator.launch
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
  • ros/launch/detection_tracker.launch

      • camera [default: cam3d]

      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: $(arg camera)_nodelet_manager]
  • ros/launch/kinect_nodelet.launch
      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]
  • ros/launch/people_detection.launch
      • camera_namespace [default: camera]
      • colorimage_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/rgb/image_raw]
      • pointcloud_rgb_in_topic [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/depth_registered/points]
      • using_nodelets [default: false]
      • nodelet_manager [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/$(arg camera_namespace)_nodelet_manager]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • launch_head_detector [default: true]

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup

  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3

  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev

  • Simplification

  • Update head_detector_node.cpp

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. 1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro

  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
  • Merge pull request #33 from ipa-fmw/fix/frame_ids use frame_ids from input message
  • use frame_ids from input message

File truncated at 100 lines see the full file

      • camera [default: cam3d]
      • rgb_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_rgb_optical_frame]
      • depth_frame_id [default: /$(arg camera)_depth_optical_frame]
      • device_id [default: #1]
      • rgb_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • depth_camera_info_url [default: ]
      • rgb [default: rgb]
      • ir [default: ir]
      • depth [default: depth]
      • depth_registered [default: depth_registered]
      • projector [default: projector]
      • bond [default: false]
      • debug [default: false]

      • nodelet_manager [default: /$(arg camera_namespace)/$(arg camera_namespace)_nodelet_manager]
      • start_manager [default: false]
      • launch_head_detector [default: true]
      • launch_face_detector [default: true]

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.5
License LGPL
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo_dev
Last Updated 2019-03-14
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released UNRELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (0)
Good First Issues (0)
Pull Requests to Review (0)

Package Description

Detects persons through head and face detection and identifies the detected faces. The results are tracked over time to increase confidence. The system is optimized to be used with a Microsoft Kinect or Asus Xtion Pro Live sensor but could also handle different sensors as long as depth and color images are provided.

Additional Links

  • Website

Maintainers

  • Richard Bormann

Authors

  • Richard Bormann
  • Thomas Zwölfer
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Changelog for package cob_people_detection

1.0.5 (2019-03-14)

  • Merge pull request #78 from ipa-fxm/fix/pluginlib_macro update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • update to use non deprecated pluginlib macro
  • Merge pull request #75 from ipa320/remove_obsolete_cmake_modules remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • remove obsolete dependencies to cmake_modules
  • Merge pull request #74 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev OpenCV 2+3 compatibility cleanup
  • Merge pull request #1 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixes for opencv 2 in indigo
  • updates for having the software ready with opencv2 and 3
  • Merge pull request #73 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/pierrekilly/cob_people_perception into kinetic_dev
  • fixed bug with untrained system not starting the people detection client
  • Simplification
  • This should also work and is simpler.
  • adapted people detection for retro compatibility with OpenCV 2
  • Make the repo compile under ROS Lunar (OpenCV 3.2.0) This Github issue helped a lot: https://github.com/wg-perception/people/issues/44
  • Merge pull request #70 from ipa-fxm/add_launch_arguments Add launch arguments
  • introduce launch arguments to start parts of the pipeline
  • Publishers in face detector only publish if subscribers are present
  • Update head_detector_node.cpp
  • Merge pull request #68 from ipa-fxm/fix/return_value_handling fix return value handling
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • Update face_recognizer_node.cpp
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa320/cob_people_perception into merge
  • added cartesian face coordinate output to face_detector - must be finished with making this output optional on subscribers
  • fix return value handling
  • Merge pull request #63 from ipa-fxm/use_external_project Multi distro travis indigo
  • obey read-only file system in cob_people_detection
  • Merge pull request #62 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev added libxi and libxmu as dependencies for ros build farm
  • cleaned up spaces/tabs
  • Merge pull request #48 from ipa-rmb/indigo_dev Bugfix for running openni2_tracker and openni2_launch simultaneously
  • updated readmes
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of github.com:ipa-rmb/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fixed topic names in people client
  • Merge pull request #38 from ipa-fmw/indigo_dev set correct frame_if for tracker
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' into indigo_dev
  • Merge branch 'indigo_dev' of https://github.com/ipa320/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • fix frame_id for empty detection arrays
  • Merge pull request #35 from ipa-fmw/fix/output_messages fix output messages
  • fix frame_id for header
  • fix header of output messages
  • Merge branch 'fix/output_messages' of github.com:ipa-fmw/cob_people_perception into indigo_dev
  • use nodename as detector (neccessary for multiple detectors)
  • fix headers
  • Merge pull request #34 from ipa-fmw/fix/remove_global_ns remove global namespaces
  • Update detection_tracker.launch
  • Update face_capture.launch
  • fix systax
  • fix launch files without global ns
  • delete global namespaces, use private nodehandles and adapt remappings in launch files
  • remove global namespaces
